title: Design By Violet Merry Christmas Nutcraker Gift Set - Includes 1 Large Shopper Bag, Tissue Paper and Christmas Card - Gift Wrap, Nutcracker Themed
features: Complete Nutcracker-Themed Wrapping Set: This set includes a large Nutcracker gift bag, six red tissue paper sheets, and a coordinating Nutcracker Christmas card for a festive, classic holiday look.
Spacious Large Shopper Gift Bag: The generously sized bag (26.5cm x 33cm x 14cm) is ideal for wrapping larger or multiple gifts with ease.
Bright Red Tissue Paper for a Festive Touch: Comes with six sheets of red tissue paper, adding a vibrant pop of colour to your wrapped gifts and creating a polished look.
Matching Nutcracker Christmas Card: A thoughtfully designed Nutcracker-themed card is included, making it simple to share warm Christmas wishes along with your beautifully wrapped gifts.
Perfect for Classic Holiday Gift-Giving: This coordinated set is an easy, stylish solution for presenting larger gifts, bringing traditional Christmas charm to your celebrations.
description: Product Description Merry Christmas Nutcraker Gift Bag and Nutcracker Greeting Card Set - Includes 1 Large Shopper Gift Bag, Greeting Card, 1x6 Sheet Red Tissue Paper Celebrate the magic of Christmas with the Design By Violet Merry Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag and Card Set. Complete Nutcracker-Themed Wrapping Set: This set includes a large Nutcracker gift bag, 1x6 red tissue paper sheets, and a coordinating Merry Christmas Nutcracker Greeting Card for a festive, classic holiday look. Spacious Large Merry Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag: The generously sized bag (26.5cm x 33cm x 14cm) is ideal for wrapping larger or multiple gifts with ease. Bright Red Tissue Paper for a Festive Touch: Comes with six sheets of red tissue paper, adding a vibrant pop of colour to your wrapped gifts and creating a polished look. Matching Merry Christmas Nutcracker Greeting Card: A thoughtfully designed Nutcracker-themed card is included, making it simple to share warm Christmas wishes along with your beautifully wrapped gifts. Ideal for Stylish, Hassle-Free Wrapping: This all-in-one set saves time while giving your gifts a polished, cohesive presentation that’s perfect for the festive season. 1 x Large Shopper Merry Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag: Large Shopper Merry Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag Size 26.5cm x 33cm x 14cm Ideal for anyone who loves classic Christmas themes, this gift wrap set makes it easy to give a polished and memorable presentation. 1x Merry Christmas Nutcracker Greeting Card A thoughtfully designed Nutcracker-themed card is included, making it simple to share warm Christmas wishes along with your beautifully wrapped gifts. 1x6 Sheets Red Tissue Paper Red Tissue Paper for Added Elegance: This gift bag includes six sheets of red tissue paper, which adds a refined touch that beautifully complements the gift bags. Each Sheet 50x 66cm (Approx) Ideal for gift wrap, arts and crafts Celebrate the magic of Christmas with the Design By Violet Merry Christmas Nutcracker Gift Bag and Card Set.
